clean_title: Two Player Game and String Manipulation
explanation: The first code implements a two-player game where players take turns marking squares on a board until one player wins or all squares are filled with no winner. The second program processes strings by converting them into a specific format where underscores are replaced by uppercase letters, while the third program counts the occurrences of each letter in a given string and orders them by frequency, ensuring uppercase letters are listed before their lowercase counterparts.
name: 2018-06-16_hw5-cs
subject: HW5 - CS
summary: This programming assignment consists of three individual C programs focusing on different functionalities such as a simple two-player game, string manipulation to convert formats and count characters, and ordering letters by frequency.
